message:
ci: Remove provenance flag (requires public repo)

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ipik41j65vfbp0yn4hzcgim8

files.patch:
@@ -61,7 +61,7 @@ jobs:
         working-directory: ./packages/${{ steps.pkg.outputs.name }}
 
       - name: Publish to npm
-        run: npm publish --provenance --access public
+        run: npm publish --access public
         working-directory: ./packages/${{ steps.pkg.outputs.name }}
 
       - name: Create GitHub Release
